'''lahata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbio|mbio]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbio|mbio]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lahata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhætæth|læhætæth]] || [[word:læhætæj|læhætæj]] || [[word:læhætæsh|læhætæsh]] || [[word:læhætæ|læhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahahatath|lahahatath]] || [[word:lahahataj|lahahataj]] || [[word:lahahatash|lahahatash]] || [[word:lahahata|lahahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahatath|lahatath]] || [[word:lahataj|lahataj]] || [[word:lahatash|lahatash]] || [[word:lahata|lahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahaftath|lahaftath]] || [[word:lahaftaj|lahaftaj]] || [[word:lahaftash|lahaftash]] || [[word:lahaftaf|lahaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahatatha|lahatatha]] || [[word:lahataja|lahataja]] || [[word:lahatasha|lahatasha]] || [[word:lahataka|lahataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahatath|lahatath]] || [[word:lahataj|lahataj]] || [[word:lahatash|lahatash]] || [[word:lahata|lahata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahatathal|lahatathal]] || [[word:lahatajal|lahatajal]] || [[word:lahatashal|lahatashal]] || [[word:lahatakal|lahatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahatathatha|lahatathatha]] || [[word:lahatajaja|lahatajaja]] || [[word:lahatashasha|lahatashasha]] || [[word:lahataka|lahataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahatathan|lahatathan]] || [[word:lahatajan|lahatajan]] || [[word:lahatashan|lahatashan]] || [[word:lahatakan|lahatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahatathaoro|lahatathaoro]] || [[word:lahatajaoro|lahatajaoro]] || [[word:lahatashaoro|lahatashaoro]] || [[word:lahatakaoro|lahatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
